landing.title: zam-dun
landing.subtitle: zam-dun gathers the night's news from sources you trust, distills it with AI, and hands you a calm, three-minute briefing at sunrise.
landing.preview_bullet1: Curated overnight from the sources you trust.
landing.preview_bullet2: Summarized and translated while you slept.
landing.feature1: RSS and API feeds you choose — gathered and de-duplicated overnight.
landing.feature2: Concise, factual summaries, translated into your language.
landing.feature3: A push notification the moment your briefing is ready.
landing.cta_title: Sleep well. We'll read the internet.
landing.cta_sub: No account, no inbox clutter. Just open it and go.

dashboard.title: Today's Briefing
dashboard.empty: Your morning digest is ready to brew.
dashboard.empty_hint: Pull tonight's stories into a briefing you can read in three minutes.
dashboard.limited_notice: This item was summarized without AI. Source text is shown as-is.

sources.title: Source Settings
sources.readonly_notice: Source management is admin-only — you're viewing the current status.

delete_account.title: Delete Account
delete_account.warning: This will permanently delete your account, preferences, and all briefing data. This action cannot be undone.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
content: zam-dun collects and stores only the data necessary to deliver your morning briefing.

Account data — an anonymous visitor ID kept in a cookie. No email, no password, no name. Preferences — timezone, schedule, topics, and keyword filters you explicitly set. Briefing data — generated summaries stored and linked to that visitor ID. Push data — if you enable notifications, the browser push subscription needed to deliver them.
We do not sell your data. We do not serve ads. Source content is fetched from public RSS/API feeds and summarized; full article text is not stored.
You can delete your account at any time, which removes all stored data.

terms.title: Terms of Service
content: zam-dun is provided "as is" without warranty. The briefing is generated automatically from public sources and may contain inaccuracies.
You are responsible for your preferences and for any actions taken based on the briefing.
We reserve the right to discontinue the service at any time. You may delete your account at any time.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.hint: That page hit a snag. Try again, or head back to your briefing.
